description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a weathered, slightly flattened shape and pronounced vertical ridges. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, jagged-toothed grin, triangular eyes, and a sharp nose, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The surface displays mottled brownish spots and subtle streaks, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. The back and sides are uncarved, showing only the natural pumpkin texture and coloration. There is no visible stem on the top, and the interior appears hollow, as seen through the carved openings. The overall look is evocative of Halloween decorations commonly found in urban outdoor settings.
description: A weathered, orange pumpkin carved with a sinister jack-o'-lantern face, featuring jagged teeth and triangular eyes, with a mottled, stemless top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with jagged teeth, triangular eyes, and a sharp nose, all cut deeply into the pumpkin.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the depth of the facial cutouts and the natural, ridged pumpkin surface, with a visible eye opening.
description_view_2: The back view displays an uncarved, ridged pumpkin surface with mottled orange and brown coloration and no visible openings.
description_view_3: The right side shows the edge of the mouth and eye cutouts, along with the pumpkin's natural ridges and surface texture.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with a jagged, menacing mouth, triangular eyes, and a sharp triangular nose, all deeply cut into the pumpkin's front face.
